principles: No 'Startup Blue': Avoid generic tech colors. Use Gold, Cream, and Obsidian.
Serif Supremacy: Headings must use Cormorant Garamond. No Sans-serif headings.
Sharp & Soft: Mix 0px borders (sharp elegance) with 4px borders (soft touch). Avoid full rounded-xl.
White Space as Luxury: Dense layouts are for dashboards. Booking requires breathing room.

headings.usage: All Page Titles, Card Titles, Section Headers
headings.styles: Use italics for emphasis (e.g., 'The Grand Ballroom')

body.usage: Navigation, Buttons, Metadata, Long form text

specs.price_tag: Absolute top-left, Glassmorphism or Solid Black pill
specs.actions: Heart icon top-right (outline gold, fill gold on active)
specs.footer: Minimal. Location + Rating. 'Compare' button visible on hover (desktop) or always (mobile).

buttons.primary: bg-[#0B0B0D] text-[#F4F1EC] hover:bg-[#2A2A2A] rounded-none px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: border border-[#0B0B0D] text-[#0B0B0D] hover:bg-[#0B0B0D] hover:text-[#F4F1EC] rounded-none px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold

inputs.style: border-b border-[#E5E0D8] bg-transparent px-0 py-3 focus:border-[#D4B36A] focus:ring-0 rounded-none placeholder:text-[#A0A0A0]
inputs.label: uppercase text-[10px] tracking-[0.2em] text-[#6E6E6E] mb-1

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: @radix-ui/react-tabs for the Login Role Switcher.
INSTALL: cormorant-garamond font via Google Fonts import in index.css.
LOGIN PAGE: Use the 'login_background' image as a full-screen split (desktop) or background overlay (mobile). Use Glassmorphism for the form container.
SEARCH PAGE: Implement 'The Estate Card' design. Remove sidebar filters on mobile; use a 'Filter' button that opens a drawer.
NAVIGATION: Use a sticky bottom bar on mobile (Home, Search, Saved, Account) with high-end iconography (Lucide thin stroke).
CRITICAL: Do NOT use rounded-xl. Use rounded-none or rounded-sm for a sharper, more premium look.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure Gold text is only used on Dark backgrounds. On White backgrounds, Gold is for borders/icons only. Use Black for text.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Use noise textures for backgrounds to avoid digital flatness.
